creator: Kevin Goldsmith

evidence.text: Kevin Goldsmith shows what Avvo has done to build a foundation for a continuous improvement culture: frameworks, processes that support and empower individuals and groups to own and drive improvements to make themselves more efficient and the company a better place to work.
